form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on March 27 over 425m at Bendigo behind Sweet Millie beaten 3.5 lengths (24.62) in a Restricted WIN H. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage second but before that won easily by 7 lengths at Bendigo (28.22) beating High Cotton in a Grade 5 on March 11. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 2, scoring three times. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.71) when seventh over 460m at Geelong in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 22.28 when third at Warrnambool latest but the run prior he clocked a solid 22.26 over 390m finishing second at Ballarat. Rates a top chance with a repeat here.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Warrnambool over 450m in 26.13. Followed that up with a minor placing over 450m at Warrnambool at Mix 6/7 FIN four days ago. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Temora (26.49) in a Grade 5, finishing a 13 length eighth. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from three starts. Among the chances on best.
